instructions: Both AIs: pick ideas from this list, mark status as you work, update assignee. Impact: 1-5 (5=game-changing). Effort: 1-5 (5=days of work). Priority = impact/effort ratio. Star ratings show recommendation strength.

categories.C_ENEMIES: Enemy types, AI behavior, boss mechanics

ideas.title: Hero pixel-art sprite
ideas.desc: Replace teal circle with procedural pixel-art knight (sword/shield/armor visible). Animate idle breathing + walk cycle (2-frame swap).

ideas.title: Enemy pixel-art sprites per tier
ideas.desc: Each of 10 enemy types gets unique pixel art instead of colored circles. Skeleton=bones, Zombie=shambling, Wraith=transparent, etc.

ideas.title: Tower pixel-art per type + upgrade level
ideas.desc: Arrow=wooden bow platform, Magic=crystal spire, Siege=catapult, Support=glowing shrine. Each upgrade level adds visual detail.

ideas.title: Death animation for enemies
ideas.desc: Enemies don't just vanish — play 0.3s collapse/dissolve animation (shrink + fade + scatter particles) before bone pile spawns.

ideas.title: Projectile trail particles
ideas.desc: Arrows leave dotted trails, magic bolts leave glowing particles, siege shots leave smoke trails. Fading behind projectile effects.

ideas.title: Footstep dust particles on hero movement
ideas.desc: Small puff particles spawn behind hero when moving. Different color on different terrain.

ideas.title: Bone pile glow effect for fresh piles
ideas.desc: Newly created bone piles pulse with faint necromantic green glow that fades over 5 seconds. Signals to player that enemies might consume them.

ideas.title: Level-up flash effect
ideas.desc: When hero levels up, golden ring expands outward from hero + floating 'LEVEL UP!' text. Brief screen flash.

ideas.title: Equipment-based hero color scheme
ideas.desc: Hero sprite tint changes based on equipped set: Holy=gold, Death=purple, Fire=red, Knight=blue. Shows class identity at a glance.

ideas.title: Day/night cycle visual overlay
ideas.desc: Background gradually shifts from blue to dark purple over waves. Undead get stronger at 'night' (higher wave). Atmospheric lighting overlay.

ideas.title: Enemy item drops on death
ideas.desc: Enemies have loot table: 5% base chance for normal enemies, 30% for mini-bosses, 100% for bosses. Items auto-add to inventory or drop on ground if full.

ideas.title: Ground item pickups
ideas.desc: When inventory is full, dropped items appear on the map as glowing squares. Hero walks over them to pick up (swaps or discards). Despawn after 30s.

ideas.title: Dodge roll mechanic
ideas.desc: SPACE = dodge roll: 0.3s invincibility, quick dash in movement direction. 2s cooldown. Adds skill-based play.

ideas.title: Experience/gold multiplier for kill streaks
ideas.desc: Kill 5 enemies within 3 seconds = 1.5x XP/gold. Kill 10 = 2x. Visual combo counter on screen.

ideas.title: Mana regeneration over time
ideas.desc: Passive 1 mana/second regen (configurable). Magic tree skills boost regen rate. Reduces potion dependency.

ideas.title: Consumable hotbar (1-3 slots)
ideas.desc: Drag potions from inventory to hotbar slots. Press F1/F2/F3 to use instantly during combat. Auto-refill from inventory.

ideas.title: Critical hit visual + sound feedback
ideas.desc: Crits show bigger red damage numbers with '!' suffix + brief white flash on target + screen shake (already partially done).

ideas.title: Hero class selection at game start
ideas.desc: Choice of Warrior/Mage/Ranger/Paladin — each starts with different weapon + stat distribution + unique ability. Reuses existing set archetypes.

ideas.title: Difficulty selection (Easy/Normal/Hard/Nightmare)
ideas.desc: Multiplier on enemy HP/ATK/speed. Higher difficulty = better drop rates + more XP. Shown on save slot.

ideas.title: Bone pile consumption: enemies grow stronger
ideas.desc: When enemies consume bone piles, they visibly grow larger (radius += 20%), gain HP and ATK. Creates urgency to kill fast or clean piles.

ideas.title: Enemy spawn animation
ideas.desc: Enemies fade in from dark portal effect over 0.5s instead of appearing instantly. Gives player visual warning.

ideas.title: Skeleton archers (ranged enemy tier 2)
ideas.desc: Skeletons already have 150px range — add visible arrow projectiles and kiting AI (move away when hero gets close).

ideas.title: Wraith phasing through towers
ideas.desc: Wraith (canPhase=true) ignores tower collision, moves through them. Forces hero to deal with it directly instead of hiding behind tower wall.

ideas.title: Revenant resurrection mechanic
ideas.desc: Revenant (canResurrect=true) gets back up after 3 seconds at 50% HP unless bone pile is consumed by hero first. Creates destroy-pile urgency.

ideas.title: Death Knight shield mechanic
ideas.desc: Death Knight raises shield every 5 seconds, absorbing next 3 hits. Shield visible as blue overlay circle. Encourages timing attacks.

ideas.title: Lich bone pile summoning AI
ideas.desc: Lich actively seeks nearest bone pile, moves to it, consumes it to summon 2-3 skeletons. Prioritizes summoning over attacking when piles available.

ideas.title: Necromancer King multi-phase boss
ideas.desc: Phase 1: melee. Phase 2 (50% HP): teleports + summons. Phase 3 (25% HP): enrage — double speed, AoE attacks. Health bar at top of screen.

ideas.title: Enemy aggro priority system
ideas.desc: Enemies choose target: nearest tower if within 2 tiles, otherwise hero. Siege enemies prioritize towers. Creates tactical tower placement.

ideas.title: Elite enemy modifier system
ideas.desc: 10% chance any enemy spawns as Elite: 2x HP, +50% ATK, glowing gold outline, guaranteed item drop. Name prefixed with 'Elite'.

ideas.title: Bone Colossus ground slam AoE
ideas.desc: Every 4 seconds, Bone Colossus slams ground — damages hero if within 80px range, screen shake, knockback push effect.

ideas.title: Tower targeting mode toggle
ideas.desc: Click tower to cycle targeting: Nearest/Strongest/Weakest/First. Each mode changes which enemy the tower shoots. UI indicator.

ideas.title: Tower upgrade paths (branching)
ideas.desc: At level 2, choose path A or B. Arrow: Rapid Fire (+speed) vs Sniper (+range+dmg). Magic: AoE vs Single-target. Visual changes per path.

ideas.title: Tower synergy bonuses
ideas.desc: Place 2 same-type towers adjacent = +15% damage. 3+ = +30%. Support tower buffs all adjacent towers +25% range. Visual link lines between synced towers.

ideas.title: Slow tower (5th tower type)
ideas.desc: New tower that doesn't deal damage but slows enemies by 40% in range. Ice/frost theme. Cost: 30 gold.

ideas.title: Trap tower (6th tower type)
ideas.desc: Ground-level trap. Invisible to enemies. Triggers once when enemy walks over: big damage + 2s stun. Rebuilds after 8s. Cost: 45 gold.

ideas.title: Tower range indicator on hover
ideas.desc: Hovering mouse over placed tower shows full range circle (already partially done via selection). Make it work on mouse proximity without clicking.

ideas.title: Tower kill counter + DPS stats
ideas.desc: Each tower tracks kills and total damage dealt. Show on hover tooltip. Helps player evaluate tower effectiveness.

ideas.title: Tower repair mechanic
ideas.desc: Enemies can damage towers if they reach them. Towers have HP bar. Hero can repair with gold (click tower + R). Adds strategic pressure.

ideas.title: Gold income tower (Support variant)
ideas.desc: Support tower upgrade path option: generates 2 gold/second instead of healing. Trade combat power for economy.

ideas.title: Tower selling confirmation + refund display
ideas.desc: When S is pressed with tower selected, show '50% refund = X gold — press S again to confirm' text overlay. Prevents accidental sells.

ideas.title: Boss guaranteed legendary drop
ideas.desc: Tier 9-10 bosses always drop at least EPIC quality item. Necromancer King drops LEGENDARY. Creates exciting boss reward moment.

ideas.title: Item rarity glow on ground drops
ideas.desc: Dropped items pulse with rarity color: gray/green/blue/purple/orange. Bigger glow = rarer item. Draws player attention.

ideas.title: Item comparison tooltip
ideas.desc: When hovering item in inventory, show stat comparison vs currently equipped item (+/- in green/red). Massive QoL improvement.

ideas.title: Unique named item drops from bosses
ideas.desc: Special hand-crafted items: 'Bone Crown of the Necromancer', 'Colossus Femur Greatsword'. Purple name, unique stat combos, flavor text.

ideas.title: Gem socket system
ideas.desc: Weapons/armor can have 1-3 gem sockets. Find gems (Ruby=ATK, Sapphire=MANA, Emerald=DEF) and socket them for bonus stats.

ideas.title: Auto-equip best item option
ideas.desc: Button in inventory: 'Auto-Equip Best' — compares total stats and equips highest DPS/defense items automatically.

ideas.title: Salvage items for forge materials
ideas.desc: Instead of just dropping items, salvage them for 'essence' used in forge upgrades. Gives value to unwanted drops.

ideas.title: Visual inventory with item size rendering
ideas.desc: Show actual Tetris-style grid in inventory panel — items drawn as colored rectangles occupying their width×height cells. Drag to rearrange.

ideas.title: Potion auto-use at low HP
ideas.desc: Toggle option: auto-use health potion when HP drops below 25%. Uses from inventory, not infinite.

ideas.title: Equipment durability system
ideas.desc: Items lose durability on use (weapons on attack, armor on hit). Break at 0 — must repair at forge. Adds resource management.

ideas.title: Wave countdown timer HUD
ideas.desc: Persistent top-center HUD showing: 'Wave 5/30 — Enemies: 12 remaining — Next wave: 2.3s'. Always visible.

ideas.title: Ability cooldown indicators
ideas.desc: Show Q/W/E/R ability icons in HUD with cooldown overlay (pie-chart timer). Gray out when not enough mana.

ideas.title: Mana bar under health bar on hero
ideas.desc: Blue mana bar rendered below the green HP bar on the hero sprite. Shows mana at a glance during combat.

ideas.title: Floating combat text variety
ideas.desc: Different colors: white=normal, yellow=crit, green=heal, blue=mana restore, purple=set bonus proc. Font size scales with magnitude.

ideas.title: Pause menu with resume/save/quit
ideas.desc: Press P to pause game. Overlay menu: Resume, Save, Settings, Quit to Menu. Timer stops, game freezes.

ideas.title: Tooltip system for all buttons
ideas.desc: Hover any action bar button to see description, mana cost, cooldown, key binding. Consistent tooltip styling.

ideas.title: XP bar under hero panel
ideas.desc: Visual progress bar showing XP toward next level. Satisfying fill animation when gaining XP.

ideas.title: Damage log sidebar
ideas.desc: Scrolling text log on right panel: 'Hero hits Skeleton for 24 dmg (CRIT!)', 'Lich consumed bone pile', 'Wave 5 complete'. Last 20 entries.

ideas.title: Gold change notification
ideas.desc: When gaining/spending gold, flash '+15g' or '-50g' near gold counter. Green for gain, red for spend.

ideas.title: Key binding reference overlay
ideas.desc: Press F1 or ? to show semi-transparent overlay listing all key bindings. Press again to dismiss.

ideas.title: Attack sound effects
ideas.desc: Sword swing, bow twang, magic zap, holy chime. Different sound per weapon class. Use JavaFX AudioClip.

ideas.title: Enemy death sound
ideas.desc: Bone crunch sound when enemies die. Louder for bosses. Satisfying feedback.

ideas.title: Background music loop
ideas.desc: Dark ambient dungeon loop during gameplay. Menu gets different track. Volume slider in settings.

ideas.title: Level-up jingle
ideas.desc: Short triumphant chime when hero levels up. Paired with visual level-up effect (#8).

ideas.title: Tower placement click sound
ideas.desc: Satisfying 'thunk' when placing tower. Error buzz when invalid placement.

ideas.title: Wave start horn/bell
ideas.desc: War horn sound at wave start. Bell toll for boss waves. Gives urgency.

ideas.title: Volume/mute controls
ideas.desc: Settings panel or simple M key to mute all audio. Separate sliders for music, SFX, UI sounds.

ideas.title: Achievement system
ideas.desc: 25 achievements: First Kill, Wave 10, 100 Kills, Full Set Equipped, Max Level, All Skills, etc. Popup notification + achievement panel.

ideas.title: Post-game stats screen
ideas.desc: Detailed end screen: DPS graph over time, gold earned per wave, items found, abilities used, towers built, damage taken. Data from GameMetrics.

ideas.title: New Game+ mode
ideas.desc: After wave 30 victory, restart with scaled-up enemies but keep equipment. Waves 31-60 with 2x HP enemies. Endless progression.

ideas.title: Bestiary / monster codex
ideas.desc: Panel showing all encountered enemy types with stats, drop tables, kill count. Lore text for each. Unlocks as you encounter them.

ideas.title: Leaderboard (local high scores)
ideas.desc: Track top 10 runs: wave reached, kills, time survived, gold earned. Stored in SQLite. Shown from main menu.

ideas.title: Meta-progression: permanent upgrades
ideas.desc: Spending 'souls' (earned on death/victory) on permanent buffs that persist across runs: +5% max HP, +1 starting gold, etc.

ideas.title: Tutorial / first-time guide
ideas.desc: On very first game, highlight key UI elements with arrows + text boxes. 'Click to move', 'Press 1 to place tower', etc. Skippable.

ideas.title: Run timer display
ideas.desc: Show elapsed time in top corner. Used for speedrun records on leaderboard.

ideas.title: Terrain types affecting movement
ideas.desc: Some tiles are swamp (slow 50%), lava (damage), grass (normal), stone (fast). Random map gen or predefined layouts per wave range.

ideas.title: Obstacles / walls on map
ideas.desc: Some tiles have rocks/walls that block movement. Creates natural chokepoints for tower placement strategy.

ideas.title: Multiple spawn points for enemies
ideas.desc: Instead of all from right side, enemies spawn from 2-4 edges. Higher waves = more spawn points. Prevents tower-wall cheese.

ideas.title: Destructible environment objects
ideas.desc: Barrels, gravestones, crates on map. Hero can break them for small gold/mana/HP pickups. Enemies smash through them.

ideas.title: Map variety per wave tier
ideas.desc: Waves 1-10: graveyard. 11-20: crypt. 21-30: throne room. Each with different background, tile colors, and obstacle layouts.

ideas.title: Base/nexus to defend
ideas.desc: Instead of just hero HP, add a base at left side with its own HP. If base dies = game over. Adds tower defense core loop.

ideas.title: Gold coins on ground from kills
ideas.desc: When enemies die, scatter 1-3 gold coin sprites that hero must walk over to collect. Auto-collect if nearby. Adds satisfying pickup loop.

ideas.title: Treasure chest spawns
ideas.desc: Rare chance (5% per wave) a treasure chest spawns on map. Hero walks to it to open: random rare+ item. Guarded by enemies.

ideas.title: Healing fountain tile
ideas.desc: One tile on map is a glowing fountain. Hero standing on it regens 5 HP/second. Enemies can destroy it.

ideas.title: Portal/teleport tiles
ideas.desc: Two linked portal tiles on map. Hero steps on one, teleports to other. Quick repositioning. Enemies ignore them.

ideas.title: AI auto-player (headless bot)
ideas.desc: AIPlayer class runs game loop without rendering. Makes decisions: move toward nearest enemy, use abilities on cooldown, place towers optimally. Logs GameMetrics.

ideas.title: AI balance report generator
ideas.desc: After AI plays N games, generate report: average wave reached, DPS per weapon class, tower effectiveness ranking, skill tree path popularity, death causes.

ideas.title: AI-driven difficulty auto-tuning
ideas.desc: If AI wins too easily, increase enemy scaling. If AI dies consistently on wave X, nerf that wave. Writes adjusted values to GameBalanceConfig.

ideas.title: AI tower placement optimizer
ideas.desc: Tries all possible tower layouts, scores them by wave survival. Uses heuristic: coverage overlap, chokepoint detection, cost efficiency.

ideas.title: AI item evaluation scoring
ideas.desc: Score items by: DPS increase, survivability increase, set completion progress. Used for auto-equip decisions and shop purchase priority.

ideas.title: Knockback on hero melee attacks
ideas.desc: Melee attacks push enemy back 10px. Keeps enemies from mobbing hero. Heavier enemies resist more.

ideas.title: Stun effect from siege tower hits
ideas.desc: Siege tower hits stun enemy for 0.5s (can't move or attack). Visible stun stars above head.

ideas.title: Poison/DoT effect from magic tower
ideas.desc: Magic tower applies poison: 3 damage/second for 3 seconds. Stacks up to 3 times. Green tint on poisoned enemies.

ideas.title: Rage meter (fills on kills, empowers hero)
ideas.desc: Kill counter fills rage bar. At 100%, press V for 5s Rage Mode: +100% ATK, +50% speed, red visual aura. Adds dynamic combat moment.

ideas.title: Blood/ichor splatter on hit
ideas.desc: When enemy takes damage, small green ichor particles spray in hit direction. Bigger for crits. Fades quickly.

ideas.title: Enemy wave preview
ideas.desc: During wave delay, show 'Next wave: 5x Skeleton, 3x Ghoul, 1x Wight' preview. Lets player prepare.

ideas.title: Enemy buff aura from Death Knight
ideas.desc: Death Knight boosts all nearby enemies: +20% ATK, +10% speed within 100px. Killing DK removes buff. Focus target priority.

ideas.title: Between-wave shop auto-open
ideas.desc: Option to auto-open shop between waves. Skip button to rush next wave. Streamlines shopping flow.

ideas.title: Skill reset NPC in shop
ideas.desc: Pay 100 gold to reset all skill points. Lets player respec for different builds. Button in shop panel.

ideas.title: Active bone pile interaction for hero
ideas.desc: Hero can consume bone piles too: press C near a pile to destroy it (denying enemies). Gain small HP/mana. Tactical decision.

copilot_priority.reason: Hero is still a circle — biggest visual gap
No loot drops = no reward loop from enemies
Boss drops are trivial to add, huge payoff
Mana regen is 1 line, fixes mana starvation
Level-up effect is cheap, feels great
Wave HUD is essential info players need
Bone consumption growth makes enemies scary
AI player enables automated balance testing
Elite enemies add variety with little code

kimi_priority.reason: Enemy sprites — biggest visual upgrade after hero
Boss phases make final boss epic
Visual grid inventory was user's request
Base defense is core TD identity

quickWins.note: Ideas that can each be done in <30 minutes with high impact

kimiInstructions: Read this file. Pick tasks from topPicks.kimi_priority or any unassigned idea. Set assignee to 'kimi' and status to 'in-progress' before starting. Mark 'completed' when done. Don't touch copilot-assigned ideas. Update dev_tasks.json with any new completions. Compile frequently.
copilotInstructions: Start with quickWins and topPicks.copilot_priority. Same workflow: claim → implement → mark done → compile.
